zh.lifeSummary: 當Hedwig von Anhalt於大約1220年出生時，她的父親Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt45歲，母親Irmgard of Thüringen24歲。她於1242年與Bolesław II Rogatka Piast結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1259年12月21日享年40歲，埋葬在波蘭萊瓦福斯吉萊格尼尼次吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hedwig von Anhalt于大约1220年出生时，她的父亲Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt45岁，母亲Irmgard of Thüringen24岁。她于1242年与Bolesław II Rogatka Piast结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1259年12月21日享年40岁，埋葬在波兰萊瓦福斯吉萊格尼尼次吉。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Anhalt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from a place called Anholt in Westphalia, which is named from Middle Low German an ‘at’ + holt ‘wood’, or from the old county and castle of Anhalt, named from late Middle High German anhalt ‘stopping point’.
topographic name for someone living near a slope, an ‘at’ + halt ‘hillside’.

nameMeanings.name: Hedwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hedwig von Anhalt was born about 1220, her father, Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt, was 45 and her mother, Irmgard of Thüringen, was 24. She married Bolesław II Rogatka Piast in 1242. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 21 December 1259, at the age of 40, and was buried in Legnica, Wrocław, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hedwig von Anhalt est née environ 1220, son père, Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Irmgard of Thüringen, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Bolesław II Rogatka Piast en 1242. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 décembre 1259, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Legnicki, wrocławskie, Pologne.

de.Neu Anhalt, Anhalt, Pleß, Silesia, Pruss: Neu Anhalt, Anhalt, Kreis Pleß, Provinz Schlesien, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Hedwig von Anhalt um 1220 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt 45 und ihre Mutter Irmgard of Thüringen 24. Sie hat 1242 Bolesław II Rogatka Piast geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Dezember 1259 im Alter von 40 Jahren und wurde in Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hedwig von Anhalt è nata il circa 1220, sua padre, Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Irmgard of Thüringen, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Bolesław II Rogatka Piast nel 1242. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 21 dicembre 1259, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hedwig von Anhaltが約1220年に生まれた時，父Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhaltは45歳，母Irmgard of Thüringenは24歳であった。1242年にBolesław II Rogatka Piastと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1259年12月21日に40歳で死去し，ポーランドウロクlアウスキレグニクイにて埋葬された。

ko.Neu Anhalt, Anhalt, Pleß, Silesia, Pruss: 독일 플레우ss 플로빈츠 슐레시 크레이스 플레ss 아할트 니우 아할트
ko.lifeSummary: Hedwig von Anhalt(이)가 대략 1220년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Irmgard of Thüringen(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1242년 Bolesław II Rogatka Piast(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1259년 12월 21일 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 록l아w스키 레그닉키에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hedwig von Anhalt nasceu aproximadamente 1220, seu pai, Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Irmgard of Thüringen, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Bolesław II Rogatka Piast em 1242. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1259, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polônia.

ru.Neu Anhalt, Anhalt, Pleß, Silesia, Pruss: неу анэлт, анэлт, крис плеss, провинз щлесиен, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hedwig von Anhalt родилась около 1220 г., её отцу по имени Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Irmgard of Thüringen, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bolesław II Rogatka Piast в 1242 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 21 декабря 1259 г. в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности легникки, рокlавски, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hedwig von Anhalt nació aproximadamente 1220, su papá, Heinrich I. Fürst von Anhalt, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Irmgard of Thüringen, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Bolesław II Rogatka Piast en 1242. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1259, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polonia.
